notes:
## New Features

- **New App — Chameleon+ Project Planner**: A low-code engineering tool to build a complete Hotel project out of the typical rooms you defined with Chameleon+ LOGO! KNX Configurator
- **Chameleon Plus Configurator**: Completely new application redesign — more intuitive and easy to use, with seamless integration with the Chameleon+ Project Planner

## Info Page

- Added version number to the product section
- Added SharKNX to the product section

## UI

- Overall visual refresh of the application interface
